headline: The Campbell’s Foundation Announces $1 Million in Community Impact Grants
summary: CAMDEN, N.J., April 14, 2026--The Campbell’s Company (NASDAQ:CPB) and The Campbell’s Foundation today announced $1 million in Community Impact Grants—the grant program’s largest single-year annual investment—awarded to 50 nonprofit organizations working to improve lives in communities where Campbell’s operates. The grants support the Foundation’s three strategic focus areas: increasing food access, encouraging healthy living and strengthening neighborhoods.
